titleStmt.title: SII 9.688: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 688. (A.R. No. 23 of 1928.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE SOUTH WALL OF THE RANGASVAMI TEMPLE AT SRIRANGAPURAM, KALYANADRUG TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 15[05], Svabhānu, Māgha, śu. 7, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1584 January 9, Thursday, in the reign of Śrīraṅgadēva-Mahārāya ruling at Penugoṇḍe. It refers to the report made by the learned men of Eṟaguḍi to the east of Hagare in Vēparāla-vēṇṭhe, a sub-division of Rāyadurga-rājya to the king Śrīraṅgarāya about the gift made to them of the village Śrīraṅgasamudra during the reign of king Kṛishṇarāya by Śrīraṅgayya, son of Tirumalanātha of Chaturtha-gōtra, who had also constructed for their use the temple of Śrīraṅganātha, a tank and a canal connecting the tank with a river for the supply of water and provided for the worship of the god by granting lands to the temple; and that these had been ruined by the Turukas. The rest of the record is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . śrīgaṇādhipatāē śrīsaraśvatithāē namaḥ śrīraṁganāthanē gati śrīkāḷaṁmā viśvanāthāya namaḥ . śrīnīlakaṁṭāē namaḥ .
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1505 neyā śvabhānusaṁvatsara māga śu 7 guruvāradalu śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa vīra (śrīraṁga)
śrīraṁgadēvamahārāyaru penugoṁḍe paṭṭaṇadali vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyaṁgaiutiralu rāyadurgadarājyada vēparāla vēṁṭeyada hagerege mūḍagaḍeya Eṟaguḍige pratināma
śrī puraveṁba Agrahārada kēśavasōmayadigaḷa tirumalabhaṭṭaru muṁtāda stitāśēṣavidvā(ṁ)nmahājanaṁgaḷu caturdaśabhuvanādhīśvaranāda śrīraṁganāthadēvara divyaśrīpādapadmaṁgaḷige sāṣṭāṁga nama
skāravaṁ māḍi māḍuva biṁnahau prāku vijayanagarada siṁhāsanadali Aṣṭhadikurāyamanōbhayaṁkaranāda kriṣṇadēvamahārāyara kayyali caturthagōtrada vidvachyēbyarāyaraṁjakada tirumalanātana makkaḷu śrīraṁ
gayyanu namage śrīraṁgasamudravanu Agrahārava māḍisi taṁma kulasvāmi Ādaṁtā śrīraṁganāthage pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu kere kaṭṭisi Ākerege hoḷekāluvenagesi śrīraṁganāthadēvara guḍiya kaṭṭisi svāmiya prathiṣṭhemāḍi Ā svāmige kerekeḷa
ge hattukoḷaga kāluve keḷage gadde hattukoḷaga beḷimarada staḷadali koṭṭa gade vokaḷa yare Ikaḷake nela 0 . kaḷa śrīraṁgasamudrada staḷada ceṁnāyaka haṁje grāmadali vritti Aṁśa dēvarige pālukoṁḍu yidanu samarpaṇeya māḍalāgi Āyūra cepuḍigeya ho
voḷage turukara kaiyali bhiṁnavāgi yippattu varuśa vāgi yiralāgi cennapuriya giriyōjana taṁma Akasāle
śrīraṁgapura yiralāgi taṁma dāyādigaḷu dēvara gade nāṭikoṁḍu taṁma pālanu tegedukoṁḍu grāmada giriyōja Ēkadase Ātage bahumānava māḍi
Digital edition of SII 9.688 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
